Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Set For Trial On Feb-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Contest Codefendant William Dauels Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEPHANIE YEE OF THE HAAPALA THOMPSON & ABURN, TEL. NO. 1-510-763-2324 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT ADAM FARVER;
ATTY. JAMES P. MOLINELLI OF THE GILSLEIDER, MCMAHON MILINELLI & PHAN TEL. NO. 1-925-446-3123 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT DAUEL.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant Adam Farver's motion to contest defendant William Dauel's application for determination of good faith settlement is granted without prejudice for a CCP 877.6 showing in the future on a better facts. Mr. Dauel seeks to avail himself of the holding in Schmid v. Superior Court (1988) 205 Cal. App. 3d 1244, yet does not provide any evidence about his current or contemplated employment or any other prospects for acquiring assets. At pages 1248-40, Schmid suggests that such evidence is required. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion To Contest Codefendant William Dauels Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
